mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.name, u.status, u.tenant_id, u.org_id, u.create_time, t.name AS tenant_name, o.name AS org_name FROM meta.sys_user u LEFT JOIN meta.sys_tenant t ON t.id = u.tenant_id LEFT JOIN meta.sys_org o ON o.id = u.org_id
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.username}, '%')
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.name}, '%')
AND u.tenant_id = #{q.tenantId} AND u.org_id = #{q.orgId} AND u.status = #{q.status}
ORDER BY u.id
